CustomField.description: TRUE when Constant Contact last reported a hard (permanent) bounce for this Contact's email — flags the record for list cleanup (DoD #5). Set by the inbound poller; distinct from Salesforce's native IsEmailBounced (which only reflects Salesforce-sent email). JSI-107 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Constant Contact reported this email as a hard bounce. Review/clean up the address.
CustomField.label: Email Hard Bounce (CC)
